title: Crowdfunding platform under production constraints
summary: How architecture and delivery practices enabled a reliable investment platform for real users.
body:
This case study focuses on architecture boundaries, data flows, and reliability decisions.

Key trade-offs included release cadence versus operational risk and strict validation versus onboarding friction.

title: Payment gateway with fiat and crypto settlement
summary: Design decisions behind payment orchestration, callbacks, and merchant-facing observability.
body:
This work emphasized robust webhook handling, idempotency, and failure-path visibility.

The main challenge was balancing integration speed with predictable reconciliation flows.
